name: Salmon Quiche Low Cholesterol
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Teaspoon celery seed and 1 tbsp. flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake the salmon, reserving the liquid.
2. Sauté the onions and peppers in oil until tender.
3. Blend together flour and celery seed.
4. Gradually add the reserved salmon liquid and cook, stirring until thickened.
5. Stir in the flaked salmon.
6. Beat egg whites, cottage cheese, Parmesan cheese, and parsley with an electric mixer until blended.
7. Mix the egg mixture with the salmon mixture and pour into the shell.
8. Bake at 325 degrees for 40 minutes or until the top is set. Serves 4.
